description: Clarifies asset condition failure risk and maintenance priorities but may understate community disruption
Clarifies capacity demand staffing and intervention timing but may miss access barriers and trust
Clarifies location and service reach but can distort lived accessibility with weak proxies
Clarifies emissions technology and cost pathways but may hide justice land and political constraints
Clarifies predictive patterns but may distort causality explanation and accountability
Clarifies live operations and anomalies but may overstate monitored reality and operational authority
